title: Moraea cedarmontana
taxonomy: Moraea cedarmontana is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States. The plant is known to be a perennial and is often found in dry environments. Moraea cedarmontana is also known as the Cedar Mountain moraea. Its classification includes being a member of the tribe Irideae.
